content:
🚀 video2x | C++
🎯 Primary Use Case: Upscaling low-resolution videos and increasing the frame rate of existing videos using AI for improved visual quality.
✨ Key Features: • Machine learning-based video super resolution • Machine learning-based frame interpolation • Rewrite in C/C++ for speed and efficiency • Cross-platform support (Windows, Linux) • Support for Anime4K v4, Real-ESRGAN, Real-CUGAN, RIFE
📖 Summary: Video2X is a C++ framework for enhancing video quality through machine learning. It offers super-resolution to upscale video resolution and frame interpolation to increase frame rates, utilizing advanced AI models and GPU acceleration.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🌟 CloudPaste | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a flexible, self-hosted, and serverless platform for managing and sharing files and text across various cloud storage providers, with integrated editing and preview capabilities.
✨ Key Features: • Serverless architecture with Cloudflare Workers, Workflow, and D1 • Support for multiple storage backends including S3-compatible, WebDAV, OneDrive, Google Drive, Telegram, HuggingFace, and GitHub
📖 Summary: CloudPaste is a serverless, self-hosted file management and text-sharing tool that aggregates multiple storage services. It offers a built-in Markdown editor, supports over 30 file format previews, and can be deployed via Cloudflare Workers or Docker.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 logo-generator-skill | HTML
🎯 Primary Use Case: Quickly generating professional, high-quality logos and presentation-ready showcase images for startups, developers, designers, and product teams.
✨ Key Features: • SVG Logo Generation (dot matrix, line systems, mixed compositions) • Design Variety (6+ distinct variants per request) • Professional Showcase (12 curated background styles) • Nano Banana Integration (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview) • Interactive HTML Previews
📖 Summary: This repository provides a professional SVG logo generator that creates multiple design variants based on product characteristics. It also generates high-end showcase images with various professional background styles, leveraging Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview for refined presentations.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🌟 mxFind | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Discovering and searching public Matrix chat rooms across different homeservers.
✨ Key Features: • Search public Matrix rooms via `/_matrix/client/v3/publicRooms` • Query multiple configured homeservers • Store room metadata in a local SQLite index • Use local search by default when the database exists • Force live search when needed
📖 Summary: mxfind is a Rust-based command-line and terminal UI tool designed to discover public Matrix chat rooms. It allows users to query multiple Matrix homeservers, build a local SQLite index for fast searching, and output results in both human-readable and machine-readable JSON formats.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 CrosshairJs | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enhance website user experience by replacing the standard mouse cursor with an engaging, animated, and interactive custom cursor that provides visual feedback on hover.
✨ Key Features: • Zero Markup - automatic style injection and DOM element handling • Magnetic Hover - snaps and scales to links and buttons • Customizable - control over colors, sizes, and blend modes
📖 Summary: Crosshair.JS is a lightweight JavaScript library that replaces the default browser cursor with a customizable, animated crosshair. It offers smart hover effects that make the cursor magnetically snap and scale to interactive elements like links and buttons, enhancing user experience with smooth animations and visual feedback.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 Remote-PC-managment | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Remote monitoring and management of computers within a local network or over the internet.
✨ Key Features: • Agent management (registration, status monitoring, deletion) • Real-time shell/PowerShell command execution • File upload and download • System information gathering (OS, processes, services) • WebSocket for real-time communication
📖 Summary: This repository provides a full-featured system for remote monitoring and management of computers, featuring a Python/Flask server and a cross-platform Rust agent. It enables real-time command execution, file transfer, system monitoring, and administrative control through a web interface.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
